description: Same root issue as the o3-pro dispute on 'sharp phase transition'. The summary rewrite (remediation #2 above) addresses this by replacing 'phase transition' framing with 'two necessary conditions' framing and explicitly noting {2,3,4,5} as a counterexample to the simple δ>1/2 threshold.
